name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack Team Task Manager with React, Express, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:start && npm run db:wait && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd .. && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.start: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && node backend/src/server.js
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.predev:full: npm run db:start && npm run db:wait && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate
